Definition: Logical model for ordering a laboratory test in Zimbabwe. Covers all data elements defined in activity ZW.LAB.A1 of the Zimbabwe Lab DAK data dictionary.
Unique identifier of the client in the ordering EMR.
National or other client identifier used for identity matching.
Client's given name (DE3) and family name (DE4).
Laboratory designated to perform the order, coded against the national laboratory list.
Lifecycle status of the fulfilment of the laboratory order.
Whether the client is pregnant at time of ordering.
Whether the client is breastfeeding at time of ordering.
Date the client started antiretroviral therapy.
Laboratory test being requested, coded against the national test list.
Clinical reason the test is being requested.
Identifier assigned to the specimen at collection; the exchange key linking specimen, order and result.
Type of specimen collected, coded against the national sample type list.
Date and time the specimen was collected.
